apple-ios.notes: Opaque square source. Do not pre-round; App Store applies mask.

apple-macos.notes: Use as AppIcon base; retain 10% optical padding.

android-foreground.notes: Adaptive foreground, keep mark within 66% safe zone.

android-background.notes: Use solid #07110F background layer in production.

windows-store.notes: Generate StoreLogo and Square assets from this master.

linux.notes: Export symbolic monochrome variant for GNOME menus.

watchos.notes: Use the simplified mark below 40 pt.
